'''Chris Leikvoll''' ({{IPAc-en|l|aɪ|k|v|ɒ|l}}) (born 4 December 1975) is an Australian former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org" />

==Background==
Leikvoll was born in Australia to immigrant British parents. Leikvoll's surname comes from his [[Norwegian people|Norwegian]] grandfather.<ref name="Chris Leikvoll at warringtonwolves.org">{{cite web|url=http://www.warringtonwolves.org/PlayerDisplay.ink?skip=15&season=2007&Playertype=s |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070930121532/http://www.warringtonwolves.org/PlayerDisplay.ink?skip=15&season=2007&Playertype=s |url-status=dead|title=Chris Leikvoll|publisher=warringtonwolves.org|archive-date=30 September 2007}} </ref>

==Playing career==
Leikvoll made his debut for Illawarra in round 12 1997 against South Sydney which ended in a 28–28 draw.  Leikvoll played in the club's final ever game as a stand-alone entity which was a 25–24 loss to Canterbury.

Leikvoll played as a {{rlp|pr}} in the [[St George Illawarra Dragons]] side that made the [[1999 NRL Grand Final]] against the [[Melbourne Storm]]. It was the joint venture's first season in the premiership.

Leikvoll signed with the [[Warrington Wolves]] from [[St George Illawarra Dragons]] in 2004 until November 2006. Leikvoll has a [[British passport]], so he did not count on the [[Quota players|overseas quota]].<ref name="Chris Leikvoll at warringtonwolves.org"/>
